summary: Independent read-only QA accepts M7 topology validation. The validation branch adds process/handoff evidence only, not new test code; focused negative-test claims are accepted as coverage by already integrated schema, fixture, client, save, route, web, and E2E tests. Default player map evidence uses explicit topology-backed district polygons, route-node anchors, route edges/path previews, topology hash, and reason codes, not hidden grid/hex/lattice/sequential-id authority. This does not approve formal M7 content lock.

tests_run.result: Only process state, routes, task registry, start handoff, and writer REVIEW handoff changed; no production or test code was added by this validation branch.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/sim-core-map-topology.test.ts tests/content-tools-compiler.test.ts tests/map-renderer-m2-map.test.ts tests/save-load-contract.test.ts tests/sim-core-boot-boundary.test.ts tests/sim-core-m2-route-transport.test.ts apps/web/src/shell/web-client-shell.test.tsx
tests_run.result: 6 root-config test files passed, 74 tests passed.
1 web test file passed, 11 tests passed.
Node and worker-compatible hashes matched for hello, command/query, save/load, M4, M5, and M6 Alpha replay.
All listed content fixtures validated; M2 prototype fixture reports 14 districts, 25 routes, 20 map geometries, manifestHash d474a105.

tests_run.command: pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts tests/deterministic-hash.test.ts

decisions.decision: Accept M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001 as evidence sufficient to route to lead_orchestrator for closure handling.
Do not describe this validation branch as adding tests; it relied on existing integrated tests plus handoff evidence and QA spot-checks.
This ACCEPT does not approve M7 content lock or M7 exit. It only supports reopening product-owner reconsideration after integration.

risks.summary: Evidence PNGs are map-region screenshots generated under 1440x900 and 1280x720 viewports, not full-viewport PNGs; actual dimensions observed were 1012x982 and 904x902.
Route-node markers and route 24 line are sufficient topology evidence but remain low-fidelity and not final art.
Legacy M2 grid helper code remains for non-default fixtures/tests; accepted because default player path asserts topology-region-network and data-player-grid=not-used.

requested_action: Proceed with lead closure/integration checks for M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001. Reopen M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 only for product-owner reconsideration; do not mark content lock accepted autonomously.
